page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project Official Graphic Library
text:
is an artbook for the video game Neon Genesis Evangelion: Ayanami Raising Project by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 07 August 2001. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047070696 

Overview

Includes all original images, including visuals from the game, as well as those drawn for promotional purposes. A book full of newly drawn illustrations that concentrates the charm of Ayanami Raising Project.

Table of Contents

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4047070696
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4047070691
